title: Zulu v Chilufya and Ors (2022/CCZ/0027) [2023] ZMCC 7 (3 August 2023)
issue_tags: Constitutional Court jurisdiction; Article 128(1) interpretation jurisdiction; Article 180(4)(c) and (8); mode of commencement—Originating Summons v petition; personalised and contentious constitutional questions; review of Subordinate Court decisions; abuse of court process.
outcome_detail: Originating Summons improperly used to raise personalised constitutional issues; matter dismissed for lack of jurisdiction and abuse of process
